notes: in_app_purchase on the client. Server VERIFIES receipts before crediting entitlement. Consumables: message bundles and AI-credit bundles (credit the respective ledgers). Non-consumable/subscription: plan (sets the business plan id). Backs a POST /billing/verify-receipt endpoint (platform, productId, receipt/purchaseToken). Optional inbound: App Store Server Notifications / Play Real-time Developer Notifications for subscription lifecycle. Behind a ReceiptVerifier interface, stubbed in tests. NEVER trust client-reported entitlement.
